test_name: 2x B200 FP16 Tensor Core Load Test

evidence_chain.significance: FP16 load started SM clock at 1965 MHz but utilization already 0%
8 minutes sustained FP16 compute at 0% utilization throughout
COMPLETE TELEMETRY BLACKOUT - 0% util reported for entire 8 minute FP16 test
SM clock 1965 MHz and elevated power confirm GPU actively computing despite 0% util report
FP16 draws less power than FP32 but has worse telemetry - complete blackout vs partial

observation_1.detail: 0% utilization reported for entire 8 minute FP16 test while GPU clearly computing

observation_2.detail: SM clock at 1965 MHz throughout confirms tensor cores active despite 0% util report

observation_3.detail: FP32 showed 7-9% util. FP16 shows 0% util. FP16 has complete telemetry blackout.

observation_4.detail: 195-202W sustained for 8 minutes confirms active compute despite 0% util reporting

observation_5.detail: FP16 at 197W vs FP32 at 238W. Tensor cores more efficient but completely invisible to telemetry.

screenshot_evidence.description: Raw nvidia-smi terminal output captured in RunPod web terminal
